title: Peruvian Fried Rice
description: A flavorful and spicy fried rice dish, inspired by Peruvian cuisine.

ingredients.name: Peruvian Aji Amarillo Pepper
ingredients.notes: Or substitute with jalapeno or serrano pepper

instructions: Heat the deep fry oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced aji amarillo pepper and cook for 1 minute.
Add the scrambled eggs and cook until set, breaking them up with a spatula.
Add the cooked fried rice to the wok and stir to combine with the eggs and pepper.
Add the soy sauce, salt, and black pepper, and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Transfer the fried rice to a serving platter and garnish with green onion and cilantro.
Squeeze the lime juice over the top and serve immediately.
